name: neurostrata-memory-and-tracking-eval
task_prompt: Create a file named 'hello.txt' with the text 'hello world'. Before making changes, you MUST track your work using the Beads 'bd' tracker (create a new task and claim it). After finishing the code, you MUST use 'neurostrata_add_memory' to record what you learned, and finally commit and push your code.

evaluators.name: 1. Beads Issue Tracker Used
script: if [ ! -d '.beads' ] || ! grep -q 'task' .beads/*.json 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Agent failed to use `bd create` or `bd update` to track its task.' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 2. NeuroStrata Memory Extracted
script: if [ ! -d '.NeuroStrata/sessions' ] || [ -z "$(find .NeuroStrata/sessions -type f -name '*.jsonl' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo 'Agent failed to log memories into NeuroStrata. The Pre-Push Hook would have blocked this.' >&2; exit 1; fi

evaluators.name: 3. Code Committed and Pushed
script: if ! git log -1 --pretty=%B | grep -q 'hello.txt'; then echo 'Agent failed to git commit the changes.' >&2; exit 1; fi
